_comment: Documents EVERY config key with NO real secrets (DL-011). Copy to appsettings.json / set env vars for dev; in prod, KV-backed values come from Vault via VaultSharp and bind into the Options pattern (IOptions<T>, ValidateOnStart). Required keys must fail at startup if missing.

DotNet.TargetFramework: net10.0 (default LTS; switch to net8.0 only on architect instruction)

Vault._enabled: false = dev fallback (config from appsettings.json + env); true = load KV secrets at startup via VaultSharp
Vault._kvSecretPath: KV v2 path whose fields use .NET config paths, e.g. 'Anthropic:ApiKey', 'ConnectionStrings:Postgres'

Storage._publicBaseUrl: Meta-reachable public origin for the live MediaUrl (DL-055): {PublicBaseUrl}/brands/{brand_id}/assets/{asset_id}.png. Empty in mock/CI; the live runbook sets it to the public tunnel host (e.g. https://<sub>.trycloudflare.com). Non-secret.

Redis._role: IDistributedCache only — NOT the queue broker

Hangfire._store: PostgreSQL (separate schema; holds no brand data)

Embeddings._endpointNote: host:port only — no http:// prefix; the application prepends the scheme. DL-024: served by HF TEI container.
Embeddings._dimensionRule: MUST equal the pgvector column dimension set in the EF migration
Embeddings._prefixes: search_document: on ingest, search_query: on queries (mandatory — TEI does not apply prefixes)

Reranker._endpointNote: host:port only — no http:// prefix; the application prepends the scheme. DL-025: BAAI/bge-reranker-v2-m3 cross-encoder via /rerank.

Meta._modes: mock (default, demo runs with zero live Meta) | live (optional bonus, dual-channel IG + FB Page, human-gated, DL-055)
Meta._graph: Non-secret live Graph settings; only used when Mode=live. The per-brand token is NEVER here — it is Transit ciphertext in BrandMetaConnection, seeded via the `meta-connect` CLI and decrypted on-use at the call. The non-secret channel target ids (Facebook Page id, IG Business Account id) live on BrandMetaConnection too.

Logging._note: structured logging; never log secrets, tokens, or decrypted Meta tokens
